extraction.one_line_summary: EVENEPOEL Remco won stage 14 solo after dominating all KOM points, rebounding completely from disastrous performance previous day.
tactical_patterns: EVENEPOEL prioritized KOM jersey recovery over energy conservation, working 70-80% on front in early break despite GC ambitions.
DE GENDT Thomas attacked early not for himself but to string out peloton for teammate KRON Andreas's breakaway chances.
BARDET Romain avoided sprinting EVENEPOEL for KOM points but contested intermediate sprints, revealing selective energy management in breakaway.
GC group allowed 5+ minute gap to EVENEPOEL at only 21 minutes down, suggesting teams miscalculated his rebound potential post-bad day.

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: positive: swept all KOM points day after terrible performance, indicates exceptional recovery capacity rarely seen in multi-week racing
rider_signals.KELDERMAN Wilco: neutral: appeared in trailing group greeting EVENEPOEL, suggesting QuickStep depth allows protected riders to finish conservatively
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: positive: looked very good in GC group despite deep efforts previous day, fourth on stage shows superior recovery
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: neutral: finished third at 1:37, maintaining GC position without exceptional effort on double-Especial stage
